summary:
The tests are now passing after the edits to `app/validator.py`, indicating that the SSRF vulnerability has been fixed. This resolves the "needle" in the haystack, which appears to be the successful correction of the code to block all relevant internal addresses.

Final verification output from `./test.sh`:
```
PASS: health endpoint OK
PASS: 127.0.0.1 correctly blocked
PASS: IPv6 loopback [::1] correctly blocked
PASS: expanded IPv6 loopback correctly blocked
PASS: AWS metadata IP correctly blocked

PASS
```

The issue is resolved. If you have any further questions, let me know!
